MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOSITION TO DEFT STEPHEN COOK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/ADJUDICATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELWOOD, ANTHONY W

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT STEPHEN COOK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, ALTERNATIVELY, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES. THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PRODUCING EVIDENCE IN THAT DEFENDANT FAILED TO DEMONSTRATE THAT THE "CLIENT" REFERRED TO BY PLAINTIFF IN HIS DEPOSITION TESTIMONY WAS NOT DEFENDANT. THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED AS TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR PREMISES LIABILITY FOR FAILURE TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PRODUCING EVIDENCE. PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS TO FACT 6 AS HEARSAY IS SUSTAINED. THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED AS TO THE REMAINING ISSUES FOR A RULING ON EITHER WOULD NOT RESOLVE A CAUSE OF ACTION. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT STEPHEN COOK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, ALTERNATIVELY, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PRODUCING EVIDENCE IN THAT DEFENDANT FAILED TO DEMONSTRATE THAT THE "CLIENT" REFERRED TO BY PLAINTIFF IN HIS DEPOSITION TESTIMONY WAS NOT DEFENDANT.
THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED AS TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR PREMISES LIABILITY FOR FAILURE TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PRODUCING EVIDENCE. PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS TO FACT 6 AS HEARSAY IS SUSTAINED.
THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED AS TO THE REMAINING ISSUES FOR A RULING ON EITHER WOULD NOT RESOLVE A CAUSE OF ACTION. (302/PJM/JW) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
